title: Shower With Your Dad Simulator 2015: Do You Still Shower With Your Dad
description:
Epilepsy warning: This video game contains flashing images.

Check out the original SHOWER Steam Greenlight trailer on YouTube!

Please note that the censored version shown in the above screenshots and trailers are for public marketing images only. Shower With Your Dad Simulator 2015 in-game genitalia remains 100% uncut.

"Shower With Your Dad Simulator 2015: Do You Still Shower With Your Dad?" is a fast paced shower-simulation where you shower with your 8-bit dad.

- Fast Pace Dad Showering Simulation
- Includes 3 dads! That's likely more than the average amount!
- 3 different singleplayer game modes including ENDURODAD (Endurance Run), DADATHLON (Fast Pace Dad Matching), and DAD DIVISIONS
- A further 3 unlockable secret singleplayer game modes
- Multiplayer head-to-head showering action in CO-POP
- OST included!

- Featured on Comedy Central's @Midnight!

"Also am I the only one that notices that that's a Tom Selleck moustache on your small child?" - Jessica Chobot, host of "NerdistNews" on 

"that's it i hate videogames﻿" - John "Total Biscuit" Bain (link)

"I'm scared to touch the dads" - James Stephanie Sterling (link)

"Well this is clearly the greatest game of all time, I'm gonna quit my youtube channel right here." - PewDiePie (Link)

"You can't spell 'game refunded' without 'fun dad!'" - me

Why not?
description_short: "Shower With Your Dad Simulator 2015: Do You Still Shower With Your Dad?" is a fast paced shower-simulation where you shower with your 8-bit dad.It's good, clean fun!
